vision: To shape sustainable and inclusive urban environments in Bhutan that honor cultural heritage, uphold environmental values, and enhance community well-being
project: At Consult2T, we proactively shape sustainable and inclusive urban environments throughout Bhutan, with an unwavering commitment to respecting cultural heritage, upholding vital environmental values, and enhancing the collective well-being of its people.
our_team: Our Collective Expertise, Driven by Passion and a Commitment to Excellence

history.quote: Our journey reflects a rich history of continuous growth and adaptation, demonstrating an unwavering commitment to excellence and innovation, shaping landscapes and communities across Bhutan over the years.
history.paragraph_one: Consult2T was founded with a clear vision: to bridge the gap between policy and de- sign by leveraging extensive government-sector experience in urban planning and architecture. After serving 15 years in the Bhutan Civil Service, the founder, an accom- plished urban planner and architect, sought to create a platform where this expertise could directly contribute to national development.
history.paragraph_two: On March 27, 2023, Consult2T was officially registered with the Construction Develop- ment Board (CDB) of Bhutan. What began as a two-person operation has since grown into a dynamic team of 11 professionals. The firm has quickly established itself as a trust- ed player in the field, delivering a growing portfolio of architectural projects across the country. Notably, Consult2T is currently leading three Local Area Plans—govern- ment-backed initiatives aimed at structured urban development. As the company continues to expand, its mission remains rooted in delivering impact- ful, context-sensitive design solutions that align with Bhutan’s development goals and value

affiliation.affiliation: Strategic partnerships broaden our capabilities, fostering impact through vital collaboration.
affiliation.hydromaster: Hydromaster Solutions, a com - pany situated in Thimphu, Babe - sa, and connected to Hydro - master International, Singapore, is a valued partner of Consult2T. With a focus on cutting-edge water and wastewater treat - ment technologies, including UF, NF, RO, atnd MBR systems, Hydromaster provides sustain - able, tailored solutions for a range of water management requirements. With a goal of be - ing a leader in environmentally friendly water treatment, Hy - dromaster ....
affiliation.radical: Radical Infraventures (India) Private Limited is a reputa - ble Bhopal, Madhya Pradeshbased Urban Planning Consultancy firm. Our team’s skills in infrastructure de - sign and urban planning are combined with Radical’s con - struction and on site delivery experience in this strategic partnership. Our combined efforts yield comprehensive, data-driven solutions that are skillfully planned, exe - cuted, and in line with longterm sustainability objectives.
affiliation.yangchenma: The CEO of Consult2T is also one of the only three share - holders of Yangchenma Pvt. Ltd. (YPL). YPL is one of the Top 10 construction com - pany in Bhutan under the direction of Mr. Kinzang Dorji CEO. YPL has significant ex - ecution competence with projects valued at over USD 11.7 million, such as the 40- bed Military Hospital in De - wathang and the RCC Arch Bridge on the Nganglam– Gyelpozhing Highway. Together, we provide well-rounded, sustainable solutions that support Bhu - tan’s development objectives.
affiliation.Jun02: Jun02 Design Studio is a pre - mier interior design firm based in New Delhi, India, renowned for its high-end, contemporary, and concept-driven spac - es. With a strong reputation for creativity and precision, the studio has delivered cut - ting-edge interior solutions for some of the most iconic global and Indian brands, including Adidas, Royal Enfield, and even exclusive projects for the Am - bani family. Known for blend - ing functionality with luxury, Jun02 Design Studio continues to set new benchmarks in the world of interior architecture, making them a go-to name for bespoke commercial and res - idential interiors across India.

contact.contact_us: Reach out to us today to discuss your project; we're eager to collaborate, share our expertise, and collectively shape a sustainable and prosperous future for Bhutan.
contact.form_header: Let’s collaborate on your next initiative.
